title: Wonders Unleashed
description: Mod used to enhance experience and extend functionalities on World of Wonders.
body:
Wonders Unleashed is a client-side [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/) mod that aims to enhance gameplay experience and extend functionalities on World of Wonders.

## ✨ Features
- **Fading models:** Ensures that fading models work with modded shaders such as [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris).
- **Hidden name tags:** Hides custom name tags used on World of Wonders when in F1 mode.
- **Enhanced fountains:** Makes particles used in water shows glow with modded shaders like [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris). It also allows us to use more colors for said particles.
- **Hidden balloon rope:** Hides leash attached to your balloon if it is obstructing your view when in first person.
- **Spotlights:** Adds dynamic spotlights during shows or rides.

## ⚙️ Installation
Wonders Unleashed is a Fabric mod, which means it requires the [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/). Once installed you can simply place the Wonders Unleashed .jar file in your mods folder. Or simply use the Modrinth App which takes care of most of these things for you.

**Not sure if you installed the mod correctly?** If you are using [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) it should show up in the 'Mods' list.

## 🐞 Bug reporting
Bugs can be reported on the official [World of Wonders issue tracker](https://github.com/World-Of-Wonders/Issues)!
